task_name: Run the change-control + posture tests and record the REAL result
description: Use run_command to actually run: pytest tests/prompt_brain/test_doorstep_posture.py -q . Then run: python -m py_compile backend/agent_executor.py scripts/hoch_loop.py scripts/baseline_guard.py . Write docs/generated/r2/code_verification.md with the ACTUAL pass/fail output (not a claim). If a command is refused by policy, record that honestly.
result: Recorded the results of the change-control and posture tests, including the test failure and attempted compilation results.

task_name: Write a small self-check module and verify it compiles
description: Create backend/hoch_selfcheck.py: a tiny module with a function selfcheck() that imports backend.agent_executor and returns the string 'OK'. Then use run_command to run: python -m py_compile backend/hoch_selfcheck.py  to prove it compiles. Report the result in your finish summary. Do NOT touch any other file.
result: Created a self-check module in backend/hoch_selfcheck.py that imports a specific function from backend.agent_executor and returns 'OK'. Verified that the module compiles successfully without errors.

task_name: Write a one-paragraph proof note that the live tiered harness ran
description: Write the file docs/generated/harness_live_proof.md. It must contain one short paragraph stating that the HOCH tiered harness executed this task on the local brain at $0 cost, and it MUST include the exact marker token HARNESS_LIVE_OK on its own line.
result: Created the required proof file docs/generated/harness_live_proof.md with the mandatory text and marker token.
